title: Add Objects Button Visible on Empty Dictionary
story: As a DataTools Pro user logging in for the first time, I want to see an 'Add Objects' button when my dictionary is empty, so that I know how to get started.
description: When a user logs in for the first time and no objects exist in the dictionary, the 'Select Objects' dropdown button was not visible. This ticket adds a default 'Add Objects' button that remains visible even when no objects have been added, toggling the dropdown so the user can choose objects to include.
acceptance_criteria: Add Objects button is visible when no objects exist in the dictionary
Button toggles the object selection dropdown
Button remains visible alongside the dropdown after objects are added
ux_changes: 'Add Objects' button always visible on the dictionary page, including when the dictionary is empty.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the always-visible button and shared a screenshot. Pushed to development for review.
